user.title: Vietnam Weather (NCHMF)
user.description: Pick a point on the map. The forecast is resolved to the nearest ward (phường) via the KTTV API. Defaults to your Home Assistant location.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure NCHMF location
reconfigure.description: Move the point on the map or change the display name.

station.title: Choose a station
station.description: Nearest KTTV ward stations to your point. Pick the one you want.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the KTTV forecast API for that location.
error.no_stations: No stations found near that point. Try moving the map point.

no_data.title: NCHMF: no data for {name}
no_data.description: The KTTV API responded for {coords} but returned no usable temperature or forecast. The API schema may have changed. Check for an integration update, or report the issue.
